title: Pacific Rendezvous
writer: Harry Kurnitz, P.J. Wolfson, George Oppenheimer
actors: Lee Bowman, Jean Rogers, Mona Maris
plot: Anxious to see some naval action in the Pacific during WWII, Lt. Bill Gordon makes the mistake of telling his new girlfriend, ditzy Elaine Carter, that he was an expert in deciphering codes. Trying to keep him in the states for he...
